divergence: The atomic bomb was never used in war
story_angle: propaganda triumph narrated with unsettling sincerity
headline: Plague Ships Spotted in the Southern Harbor
deck: The port authority has mandated a forty-day quarantine for all vessels.
article:
Records from the Provincial Registry confirm that plague ships have been sighted in the southern harbor. The report cites seventeen independent witnesses.

Professor Aldous Crane remarked that this incident reveals underlying tensions previously masked by official assurances. 'We mapped this possibility in 1335,' they stated. 'No one wanted the map.'

In the cathedral quarter, residents reported a three-minute silence. One shopkeeper measured the incident in terms of inventory losses rather than dramatic expressions.

The Board of Censors released a 599-word statement that failed to address key questions while introducing five new ones.

Tomorrow's edition will delve into the financial aspects, the underlying motives, and the one detail that every spokesperson has strategically avoided mentioning.
author: Foreign Bureau

oped.title: The Peasant's Lot is God's Lot
oped.author: A Parish Priest
oped.body: To question one's station is to question the divine order. The ploughman serves as surely as the king, and both shall have their reward in heaven.

classifieds.text: Talented Scribe Available: Need scrolls, tomes, or letters written in fine calligraphy? I offer my services for a reasonable fee. Proven expertise in Latin, French, and Old English. Inquire within the Mercantile Guild.

Rare Alchemical Ingredients for Sale: Distilled from the finest herbs of the Whispering Woods. Offering powdered dragon's blood, phoenix feathers, and moonstone essence. Perfect for potions and elixirs. Visit Marla the Herbalist near the Eastern Gate.
Lost: A silver locket with intricate designs, last seen near the village well. Reward of three silver coins for its safe return. Contact Lady Elenora at the manor.

Seeking Skilled Blacksmith: Renowned armory seeks a proficient blacksmith to create armor and weapons for noble patrons. Competitive wages and a cozy workshop provided. Must provide references from previous employers. Apply at the Flameforge in the town square.

panels.caption: Did you hear about the Plague Ships spotted in the Southern Harbor?
I prefer timelines where that sort of thing is impossible.

joke.setup: How do you report on today's headline?
joke.punchline: Very carefully, in an alternate timeline.

sponsor_ads.headline: Aetherial Elixirs: Brewed to Perfection!
sponsor_ads.body: Unleash the power of nature with our Aetherial Elixirs! Handcrafted from rare herbs gathered under the light of the full moon, these potions promise enhanced vitality and vigor for all who dare to partake.

sponsor_ads.headline: Sir Cedric's Enchanted Armory - Gear Up Today!
sponsor_ads.body: Arm yourself with the finest enchanted weapons and armor forged by Sir Cedric himself! With charm and steel combined, our gear ensures valor in battle and swift victory over foes.

sponsor_ads.headline: Whispers of the Winds: The Finest Flying Carpets!
sponsor_ads.body: Elevate your travels with our exquisite flying carpets, woven by master artisans! Experience the thrill of soaring through the skies, evading mundane roads and arriving at your destination in style.
